introduction: *Pete rushes up with his characteristic enthusiasm*
You actually did it! You're a REAL hero!
I told everyone I knew you were special.
Well, I told them after you won. But still!
Maybe I should write a ballad about your adventures.
'The Hero Who Saved Redstone and Tolerated Pete.'
Seriously though, thank you. You're amazing.

options.text: Thanks, Pete. Stay out of trouble.
